name: 奶油雞 Butter Chicken
desc:
令人難以置信的奶油咖哩醬中的芳香金雞塊。 在黃油肉汁中加入奶油，使咖哩醬具有絲般柔滑豐富的質地。Aromatic golden chicken pieces in an incredibly creamy curry sauce.  Adding cream to the butter gravy gives the curry paste a silky smooth and rich texture.

份量： 1-2 人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 菠菜乾酪 Palak Paneer
desc:
我們自製的乾酪配以菠菜汁芳香的印度香料製成的綠咖哩。 Our homemade cottage cheese paired with green curry made from spinach juice  aromatic Indian spices.

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 奶油乾酪 Paneer Makhanwala
desc:
奶油咖哩與我們自製乾酪一起食用。Creamy and buttery curry served along with our home made cottage cheese.

份量： 1-2人
Portion：1-2 People

name: 香料烘茄子 Bangan Masala
desc:
新鮮出爐的茄子使用芳香的印度香料製成咖哩。Fresh baked eggplant made into curry using aromatic Indian spices.

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 腰果優格咖哩雞 Cashew Cream Chicken
desc:
咖哩裡的腰果和酸奶，會讓嫩雞肉的味道更加濃郁可口。Creamy cashews gravy add a velvety richness to this flavorful Chicken Curry.

份量： 1-2人
Portions： 1-2 People

name: 主廚羊肉 Lamb Muglai
desc:
它起源於印度的皇家廚房。  主廚羊肉咖哩是一種非素食咖哩，用十五種不同的香料燉羊肉，以帶出完美的肉味。Originated in the royal kitchens of India.  Lamb Muglai is a non-vegetarian curry, stewed lamb with 15 different spices to bring out the perfect meat flavor.

份量： 1-2人
Portion  :  1-2 People

name: 羊肉香料飯 Lamb Biryani
desc:
印度米飯用芳香的印度香料烹製而成，上面放著羊肉。 Biryani rice cooked with aromatic Indian spices and topped with lamb meat。

份量： 1-2人
Portion：1-2 People

name: 燒烤咖哩雞 Chicken Tikka Masala
desc:
馬薩拉和香料醃製的烤雞蘸上紅色變種咖哩。 煙熏烤肉和奶油醬的組合將使您的午餐或晚餐感到愉悅！Masala and spices marinated roasted chicken dip into red variant curry. The combination of smoky roast and creamy sauce will delight your lunch or dinner!

份量 ： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 辣味洋蔥雞肉 （乾） Chilly Chicken
desc:
辣味洋蔥雞有甜、辣和微酸的味道。 高溫炸的馬薩拉醃製雞肉與大蒜、洋蔥和青椒一起翻炒。 如果你喜歡辣，推薦給您！Chilli chicken has a sweet, spicy & slightly sour flavors. The masala marinated chicken fried in high temperature stir fried along with garlic, onion and green pepper. recommended for you if you like spicy!

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 香料雞 Chicken Masala
desc:
紅咖哩雞變種，由九種印度香料製成。 A variant of red curry chicken.  Made from nine Indian spices.  

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 椰汁咖哩雞 Chicken Madras
desc:
以南印度風格烹製的咖哩雞和椰奶。Chicken curry cooked in southern indian style along with coconut milk.

份量： 1-2人
Portion：1-2 People

name: 酸乳烤雞 Chicken Tandoori
desc:
在印度粘土烤箱中烤的雞肉。 用檸檬汁、酸奶和芳香香料醃製。 與香菜醬一起食用。 Chicken roasted in indian clay oven. marinated in lemon juice, yogurt, and aromatic spices. served along with chutney sauce.

份量： 1-2 人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 香汁蓮子豆 Chana Masala
desc:
鷹嘴豆咖哩由印度香料製成。Chick peas curry made from aromatic Indian spices

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 香料炒秋葵 ( 乾）Bmindi Masala
desc:
用番茄、洋蔥和芳香的印度香料炒熟的新鮮秋葵。Fresh okra sautéed with tomatoes, onions and aromatic Indian spices.

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

name: 辛辣咖哩羊肉 Lamb Vindaloo
desc:
羊肉咖哩的辛辣變種。 擁有火熱的美食愛好者想要的一切！The spicy variant of lamb curry. It has everything a fiery food lover could want! 

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People

desc:
用酸奶和香料製成的羊肉。 在印度粘土烤箱中烤製。 與香菜一起食用。Lamb prepared in yoghurt and aromatic spices. Roasted in Indian clay oven. served along with chutney sauce. The unique taste will make your taste buds dance!

份量： 1-2人
Portion： 1-2 People
